acceptance_criteria: Path traversal attempts return 400; correct file served; Cache-Control: immutable; conditional GET returns 304; media_dir not in error messages
description:
Serve media files from disk at GET /media/{path}. Validate path: no '..' components, no absolute paths, no null bytes, only alphanumeric/underscore/hyphen/dot/slash. Return file with Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable. Correct Content-Type from media row MIME type. ETag header from file size + mtime. Support conditional GET (If-None-Match → 304).

TEST DISCIPLINE:
- Valid path → correct file served with Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable
- Path with '../' component → 400
- Path with null byte → 400
- Non-existent file → 404
- Conditional GET with matching ETag → 304 with empty body

DEFENSIVE PROGRAMMING:
- Canonicalize the path AFTER joining with media_dir and verify it still starts with media_dir (defense-in-depth against path traversal even after validation)
- Never reveal media_dir in error messages
title: Static media serving: validate path, set immutable cache headers
